name: Exterior Archetype - Ashford Production Candidate
required_conditions: The exterior is Ashford at production scale (40x32 per IMP-HOM-017), not a scaled-down study.
Elara House, Shop, Inn, and Elder House each have a reachable, distinct silhouette.
A dominant roofed well anchors the civic square.
All four canonical boundary routes (Skyreach, Rustshore, Glassfield, Fogfen) remain present and readable.
Every current Map001 event/transfer beat has exactly one corresponding zone anchor.

provenance.notes: WO-0073 disposable production-scale candidate archetype, not a production-corroborated pattern in the WO-0056 contract sense -- it is instead directly corroborated by IMP-HOM-017's own build requirements and the real Map001.json it is meant to regenerate. village_cottage and a working Elder House transfer are both deliberately absent from modules_required: cottages have zero catalog-enabled TileAssembly candidates today (see WO-0071's own finding), and Map001 does not yet have a built Elder House transfer event (TRN-HOM-040 is reserved per DDR-0007/IMP-HOM-017) -- WO-0073's own constraint against inventing canon means this candidate places the Elder House facade only, with no new transfer event.
